channel.title: PatrickJS/awesome-angular Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Get the latest updates for popular awesome list

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-angular Jun 5th, 2021
item.description:
Tables

  • ignite-ui-angular's grid - The data grid, tree grid, hierarchical grid in Ignite UI for Angularstars450 provide excel-style filtering, live-data, sorting, draggable row and other toolbar.

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-angular Sep 30th, 2020
item.description:
Bootstrap Based
  • angular-bootstrap-md Material Design for Bootstrap 4 (Angular)
  • @firebaseui/ng-bootstrapstars43 - Angular Bootstrap UI library for firebase authentication powered by @ng-bootstrap
  • fuel-uistars308 Bootstrap 4 components and directives for use in Angular 2
  • ng-bootstrap - Angular 4 directives for Bootstrap 4 by the ui-bootstrap team
  • ng2-bootstrapstars5.3k Native Angular2 Bootstrap 3&4 components
  • ng2-bsstars9 Experiments with Angular 2 directives for Bootstrap.
  • ng2-modalstars111 Modal window for angular2 and bootstrap 3
  • ng2-paginatorstars32 Pagination control for angular2 and bootstrap 3
  • ng2-tabsstars38 Tabs control for angular2 and bootstrap 3

    • Calendars

  • angular-calendarstars2.2k - A flexible calendar component for angular 6.0+ that can display events on a month, week or day view.
  • ng-data-pickerstars20 - 🏄🏼 A data picker based on Angular 4+ (like iOS native datetime picker)
  • ng-fullcalendarstars750 Fullcalendar module for Angular
    • Current Angular version:
  • Third Party Components
    • Animations
    • Auth Components
    • Backend Components
    • Calendars
    • Charts
    • Drag/Drop
    • Editor Components
    • File Upload
    • Form Controls
    • Icons
    • Keyboard Mouse
    • Layout Components
    • Loaders
    • Maps
    • Notifications
    • State Management
    • Tables
    • UI Libraries
    • UX Components
    • Viewers
    • Misc Components

    • Animations

  • lottie-angular2stars315 - Render After Effects animations on Angular2 based on Bodymovin.
  • ng-animatestars642 - 🌙 A collection of cool, reusable and flexible animations for Angular
  • ngx-interactive-paycardstars58 - Interactive payment card library with smooth animations

    • Auth Components

  • casl-angular - Module which integrates isomorphic permissions management library CASLstars3.1k with Angular2+
  • ng2-permissionstars50 - Fully featured permission based access control for your angular 4+ applications. This module inspired from angular-permission.
  • ngx-auth-firebaseuistars532 - Angular Material UI component for firebase authentication
  • ngx-authstars56 -Authentication utility for Angular by @fulls1z3
  • ngx-permissionsstars758 - Permission and roles based access control for your angular(angular 2, angular 4,5+) applications(AOT, lazy modules compatible)

    • Backend Components

  • Cloudinary - Angular2 SDK for image and video management in the cloud
  • ng-s-resourcestars8 - Simplify RESTful http resource generator for Angular 4+.
  • ngx-restangularstars790 - Restangular for Angular 2 and higher versions.

    • Charts

  • @ctrl/ngx-chartjsstars40 - Functional Chart.js wrapper for Angular
  • dl-chartstars9 - Simple and lightweight Chart library without extern Dependencies
  • ng2-chartsstars1.9k Beautiful charts for Angular2 based on Chart.js
  • ngx-chartsstars3.9k - Declarative Charting Framework for Angular2 and beyond!
  • ngx-f2stars7 - Angular2+ wrapper for antv f2 mobile oriented charts
  • ngx-trendstars107 - 📈 Simple, elegant spark lines for Angular

    • Drag/Drop

  • angular2-gridstars362 A drag/drop/resize grid-based plugin directive for angular2.
  • ng2-dragulastars1.8k Drag and Drop so simple it hurts!

    • Editor Components

  • @ctrl/ngx-codemirrorstars196 - Codemirror Wrapper for Angular
  • @instechnologies/ng-roosterstars8 - Angular wrapper of roosterjs, a rich text editor
  • angular2-froala-wysiwygstars700 Angular 2 wrapper for Froala WYSIWYG HTML Editor
  • ng2-acestars33 Ace editor directive made for Angular 2
  • ng2-quill-editorstars232 - Quill editor component for Angular2

    • File Upload

  • @ctrl/ngx-droppablestars29 - Give file dropping ability to any element or component
  • file-droppastars0 Simple files drop and upload component with files list
  • ng2-file-uploadstars1.8k Easy to use file upload directives
  • ngx-awesome-uploader Angular Library for uploading files. It supports: File Upload and Preview (additionally preview images with lightbox), validation, image cropper , drag and drop with multi language support.
  • ngx-dropzonestars88 - Highly customizable component to handle file drops and selection.
  • ngx-flowstars41 - Angular7+ wrapper for flow.jsstars2.8k for file upload

    • Form Controls

  • @ctrl/ngx-emoji-martstars333 - Customizable Slack-like emoji picker for Angular
  • angular-imask Angular 4+ input mask
  • angular2-multiselect-dropdownstars237 Angular 2 multiselect dropdown component for web applications
  • angular2-text-maskstars8k Angular 2 input mask directive
  • ng-fvehstars5 - Form Validations Errors Helper - Some helpers to help you with form validation :)
  • ng-selectstars2.6k Angular ng-select - All in One UI Select, Multiselect and Autocomplete
  • ng2-dropdownstars69 Dropdown menu for angular2 and bootstrap 3
  • ng2-radio-groupstars46 Angular2 directives for radio and checkbox inputs and radio input groups
  • ng2-selectstars680 Angular2 based replacement for select boxes
  • ngx-colorstars312 - 🎨 Color Pickers from Sketch, Photoshop, Chrome, Github, Twitter & more
  • ngx-credit-cards - A Credit Card Directives and Form Validators package for Angular X (4+).
  • ngx-flag-pickerstars7 - 😻 Customizable Angular component which containing a dropdown with country flags
  • ngx-flexible-selectstars5 - The most flexible and customized select
  • ngx-recursive-formstars32 - Angular recursive form at any level based on your json input.

    • Icons

  • angular2-fontawesomestars89 Angular2 Components and Directives for Fontawesome
  • ng2-fontawesomestars20 A small directive making font awesome even easier to use.

    • Keyboard Mouse

  • @ctrl/ngx-rightclickstars64 - Context Menu Service for Angular
  • angular-clickable-clickstars3 - Sets pointer cursor on elements using standard (click) output and allows to disable such events
  • angular-escstars2 - Adds (esc) output fired by the Escape key
  • ngx-konamistars28 - Simple directive to add easter eggs in Angular 2+ applications

    • Layout Components

  • angular-fullpagestars134 Official component for fullPage.js, a fullscreen scrolling library.
  • angular-splitstars603 Angular split component
  • angular2-infinite-scroll - An Infinite Scroll Directive for Angular2 (based on Observables)
  • egjs-infinitegrid - Arrange infinite card elements according to various layout types like masonry for Angular.
  • ng2-cardstars7 - Card view component for Angular2
  • ng2-fullpagestars286 Fullpage scrolling for Angular2 based on fullPage.js
  • ng2-sheetstars2 Angular2 Components to add yours components inside a sheet window and repeatedly
  • ng2-swipeable-cardstars15 - Swipeable card component for Angular2
  • ngx-scrolltopstars14 - Lightweight, Material Design inspired button for scroll-to-top of the page. 🔼 No dependencies. Pure Angular! (Compatibility: Angular 9, Ivy, Universal, ng add)
  • od-virtualscrollstars133 Observable-based virtual scroll implementation in Angular

    • Loaders

  • @kken94/ngx-progressstars17 The most powerful and customizable progress bar for Angular ✨
  • angular-epic-spinnersstars131 Reusable spinner components for angular
  • angular2-busystars324 Show busy/loading indicators on any promise, or on any Observable's subscription
  • angular2-promise-buttonsstars85 - Loading buttons for Angular 2 by @johannesjo
  • isLoading? service - A simple and flexible loading indicator service for Angular apps.
  • ng-spinnersstars28 - Amazing collection of pure CSS angular spinners components.
  • ng2-progress-barstars20 Simple progress bar for angular2 and bootstrap 3
  • ngx-configstars134 - Configuration utility for Angular (incl. Angular Universal loader) by @fulls1z3
  • ngx-img-fallbackstars79 Load placeholder image on image error
  • ngx-progressbarstars821 - Nanoscopic progress bar, featuring realistic trickle animations.

    • Maps

  • angular-cesiumstars149 Creating map based web apps using Cesium and Angular
  • angular2-google-mapsstars2k Angular2 directives for Google Maps
  • ngx-mapbox-glstars257 - Angular binding of mapbox-gl-js

    • Notifications

  • ng-snotifystars308 - Angular 4 Notification Center
  • ng2-sweetalert2stars49 A wrapper for sweetalert2 for use with Angular 2.
  • ngx-popperstars182 - Tooltip managment, wrapper for popper.js(https://popper.js.org/)
  • ngx-toastrstars1.9k - Notifications/Toastr

    • State Management

  • angular2-query-builderstars242 Modernized query builder based on jquery QueryBuilder
  • angular2-jwtstars2.5k Library for sending authenticated HTTP requests and decoding JWTs
  • angular2-cookiestars112 Library that implements Angular 1.x $cookies service in Angular 2
  • angular-safeguardstars78 Wrapper around cookies/sessionStorage/localStorage for angular2. If all are unavailable will use an in memory storage.
  • ng2-storagestars14 A localStorage and sessionStorage wrapper written using ES6 Proxies for Angular 2
  • ngx-storestars154 - Complex library for managing localStorage, sessionStorage and cookies, allows to watch data changes, provides decorators and API based on builder pattern
  • ng-http-cachestars25 - Speed up your remote requests by automatically caching them on client.
  • ngx-cachestars145 - Cache utility for Angular (incl. browser & server platform implementations) by @fulls1z3
  • universal-model-angularstars6 - Store and state management for Angular

    • Tables

  • ag-grid Advanced Datagrid for Pure Javascript / AngularJS 1.x / AngularJS 2 / Web Components
  • ng2-handsontablestars278 Excel-like data grid / spreadsheet
  • ng2-smart-tablestars1.5k Smart data table library with sorting, filtering, pagination & add/edit/delete functions.
  • ng2-tablestars556 Simple table extension with sorting, filtering, paging... for Angular2 apps
  • ngfb-sortable-tablestars29 - Angular Firebase Sortable Table. Ability to filter and sort data with own firebase quering tools.
  • ngx-datatablestars4.3k A feature-rich yet lightweight data-table crafted for Angular2 and beyond!
    • General
  • @ngx-kit/sulastars17 - Set of themed components for Angular.
  • Axponents: of Accessible Web Components (Dylan Barrell)
  • Element Angularstars510 - Element Design components built on top of Angular 2
  • Essential JS 2 for Angular by Syncfusion - Over 60 high-performance, lightweight, modular, and responsive UI components for Angular.
  • Nebularstars7k - set of essential (Theme, UI Kit, Auth, Security) modules for complex Angular applications
  • NG ZORRO MOBILEstars720 - An enterprise-class mobile UI components based on Ant Design Mobile and Angular.
  • NG ZORROstars7.5k - An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Angular.
  • ng-lightningstars872 Native Angular 2 components & directives for Lightning Design System
  • ng-metro4stars34 - Angular implementation of UI framework Metro4
  • ng-sq-uistars83 - Simple Quality UI kit for Angular. Build by developers for developers!
  • ngSemanticstars1k - UI components based on Semantic UI
  • ngx-qrcode2stars167 - An Angular 4+ Component library for Generating QR (Quick Response ) Codes
  • ngx-uistars548 - Style and Component Library for Angular2 and beyond!
  • prime-ng Collection of rich UI components for Angular 2
  • vmware claritystars6.2k - Mostly a CSS only framework but some components are ported to Angular 2
  • Wijmo 5 - Set of UI components for Angular2
    • Material Based
  • @angular-material-extensions/contactsstars43 - Angular Library to manage contacts and users with a material design
  • @angular-material-extensions/faqstars25 - Angular Library built with material design in order to provide a reusable faq (frequently asked questions) component for every project. Ask, Answer and List
  • @angular-material-extensions/google-maps-autocompletestars138 - Autocomplete input component and directive for google-maps built with angular material design
  • @angular-material-extensions/link-previewstars52 - Angular open source UI library to preview web links
  • @angular-material-extensions/pagesstars51 - Open source library for angular apps to illustrate custom material pages content with steps (ideal for tutorials and explanations purposes)
  • @angular-material-extensions/password-strengthstars191 - Angular UI library to illustrate and validate a password's strength with material design
  • angular-jqwidgets Advanced Angular Components with Material Design.
  • Covalent - a UI platform built on Angular 2.0 + Material Design
  • Material 2stars21.4k - Angular team's Material Design components built on top of Angular 2
  • Teradata covalentstars2.2k - UI Platform built on @angular/material 2.0

    • UX Components

  • angular-shepherdstars102 - Angular 7 Service wrapping the site tour library Shepherdstars9.1k
  • ng2-archwizardstars269 - Wizard component for Angular 2
  • ngx-app-tourstars14 - Angular2+ plugin for building a tour, showcase or a walkthrough for your app

    • Viewers

  • egjs-flicking - It's reliable, flexible and extendable carousel for Angular.
  • ng2-pdf-viewerstars1k PDF viewer component
  • ng2-safe-imgstars8 Very tiny and safe img for Angular 2
  • ngu-carouselstars270 - Angular Universal carousel.
  • ngx-siema - Lightweight and simple carousel with no dependencies.

    • Misc Components

  • @ngx-contextstars119 - Angular Context: Easy property binding for router outlet and nested component trees..
  • Angular SizeObserver - style DOM elements based on their display size (rather than browser screen size).
  • angular2-simple-countdownstars26 - a simple countdown angular2 directive with multiple language
  • ng-chatstars135 - A simple facebook/linkedin lookalike chat module for Angular applications
  • ng-google-sheets-dbstars20 🚀 Use Google Sheets as your (read-only) backend!
  • ng-katexstars95 Angular module to write beautiful math expressions with TeX syntax boosted by KaTeX library
  • ng-wormholestars15 - Render components somewhere else in the DOM
  • ng2-adsensestars114 - Easy AdSense for Angular Applications
  • ngx-avatarstars215 - Avatar component that makes it possible to genearte / fetch avatar based on the information you have about the user.
  • ngx-cdmon - Library for monitoring Angular change detection performance.
  • ngx-countdownstars134 - Simple, easy and performance countdown for angular
  • ngx-i18n-routerstars38 - Route internationalization utility for Angular by @fulls1z3
  • ngx-linkifyjsstars34 - Angular V6 wrapper for linkifyjs - library for finding links in plain text and converting them to HTML tags via linkifyjs
  • ngx-metastars333 - Dynamic page title & meta tags utility for Angular (w/server-side rendering) by @fulls1z3
  • ngx-wheelstars20 - Angular prize winning wheel component!
  • xng-breadcrumbstars113 - Zero config breadcrumb solutuon. A lightweight, configurable and reactive breadcrumbs for Angular 6 and beyond.

    • Books

  • Switching to Angular 2 Packt Publishing

    • TodoMVC

  • Official Angular 2.0

    • Babel Seed Projects

  • babel-angular2-appstars266 A skeleton Angular 2 app built with Babel and Browserify.

    • Community

  • AngularAir podcast and live broadcast
  • Angular Expo showcase
    • Test
  • Testing Http services in Angular 2 with Jasmine
  • Testing UI Components with the TestComponentBuilder
    • Ahead-of-Time Compilation
  • Ahead-of-Time Compilation in Angular
  • Building an Angular Application for Production
  • Demystifying Ahead-Of-Time Compilation In Angular 2

    • On-Site Training

  • thoughtram
  • Angular 2 Workshop
  • Web Age Solutions

    • Integrations

  • Angular2-Meteor

    • Site Templates

  • NG-Dashboardstars58 - Dashboard for Angular 4+. UI Components based on Material Lightstars40. Chart Component based on MetricsGraficsJS. Map Directive based on LeafletJS. DEMO ONLINE

    • TypeScript General Resources

  • TypeScript Official Website for TypeScript
  • REPL Official TypeScript REPL that runs entirely in your browser

    • TypeScript Seed Projects

  • Angular Labstars151 A simple Angular 2+ setup using Angular CLI, TypeScript, Angular Flex Layoutstars5.4k, Material 2, AOT, and unit and e2e tests on Travis CI and Saucelabs.

    • Ionic 2 in Angular 2

  • Ionic Framework Official Website for Ionic Framework
  • Ionic Documentation Official for Ionic Framework

    • Babel Angular 2 Online Playground

  • Plunker: Angular 2 + Babel
    • Meteor General Resources
  • Angular Meteor Official Website for Angular Meteor
    • NativeScript General Resources
  • Using NativeScript
    • Haxe General Resources
  • Haxe.org
  • Haxe compiler targets compiler targets: C++, C#, Java, Python, PHP, ActionScript 3, and Flash or Neko bytecode
  • Haxe: working with JavaScript libraries
  • A success story for Haxe - about porting JavaScript to haxe targeting both JavaScript and C# "without interrupting the development of actual game by the rest of the team!", "AWESOME BONUS", "there are only benefits"

    • NgRx

  • Authentication in Angular with NGRX

    • Developer tools

  • Angular State Inspector - Helps you debug Angular component state. Supports Angular 1/2+/Ivy.

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-angular Jul 22nd, 2020

  • Adding Redux With NgRx/store and Angular2 - Part 1
  • Adding Redux with NgRx/store to Angular2 – Part 2 (Testing Reducers)

    • Integrations

  • ng-sapphiredbstars39 - Client implementation of SapphireDb, a framework for easy development of applications with realtime data synchronization and a self hosted alternative to firebase realtime database/firestore for asp.net core and ef core. Check out the documentation for more details: Documentation

    • Developer tools

  • CodeSandbox - An online IDE and prototyping tool for rapid Angular development.

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-angular Feb 27th, 2018
item.description:
Webpack

  • Angular Webpack Tour of Heroes from michaelbazosstars3 - Tour of Heroes official typescript tutorial built with webpack

    • TypeScript Seed Projects

  • Angular 2 full code coveragestars17 - Solid tested SystemJS and gulp workflow ready for your code using Angular2 final release (2.1.0) .. Demonstrates unit and full code coverage
    • Bit Resources

item.description:
Material Design

  • Material Lightstars40 Light, fast and easy to use Material Design components for Angular 2+ (Especially for mobile UI). There are several alternatives but this one has added value and advantages in my opinion (Take a loot at the Readme.md for details). There is also an online demo to see it in action. (API documentation is still lacking but in process).

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-angular Aug 26th, 2016
item.description:
Material Design

  • md2 Angular2 based Material Design components, directives and services are Accordion, Autocomplete, Collapse, Colorpicker, Datepicker, Dialog(Modal), Menu, Multiselect, Select, Switch, Tabs, Tags(Chips), Toast and Tooltip.
  • ng2-material set of material2 examples and extra components (data table, dialog, ...) built on top of @angular2-material/core
  • angular2-mdl Angular 2 components, directives and styles based on Material Design Lite
  • mdl-ext Material Design Lite Ext (carusel, grid, lightbox, selectfield, sticky header, ...)
